behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all required literals (install-browser, install-skills, network, route-list, unroute, playwright-cli route-list, playwright-cli unroute) and file areas (SKILL.md, request-mocking.md, ToolCapability type, route tools).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to change conceptually (rename command, add capability, move tools) without specifying exact line edits or code snippets.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for command names, capability values, presence of function name 'installSkills', and literal doc strings — all reasonably required by any correct fix.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests largely grep source files via regex/string matching (e.g., test_install_skills_implementation checks for '.claude' and 'cpSync' substrings); no test actually invokes install-skills to verify files are copied.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires specific code changes (renaming command, adding capability, implementing installSkills with copy logic) that a stub wouldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction-required behaviors (rename, new command, capability move, SKILL.md sections, request-mocking.md strings) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under commented sections (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config/documentation) with descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos in instruction.md paths or command names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the relevant files/commands but does not point to exact lines; localization within files is still required.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Not an agentmd-edits task; primary changes are code.
